description_long: This upright piano features a rectangular wooden body with a rich, natural wood grain texture covering all visible surfaces. The front showcases a full keyboard with alternating white and black keys, set into a slightly protruding keybed. The top section is flat and unadorned, while the lower front panel is recessed, likely for foot placement. The sides reveal the piano's depth and the thickness of the wooden panels, with no visible pedals or additional hardware. The back is a solid, uninterrupted wooden panel, emphasizing the instrument's robust construction. The overall design is simple and classic, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A classic upright piano with a wood grain finish, full keyboard, and a solid, rectangular build. The design is simple, sturdy, and visually dominated by natural wood tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the piano, the full length of the keyboard, and the wood grain texture.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a solid, uninterrupted wooden panel with prominent wood grain.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the depth, keyboard, and wood finish.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the full keyboard, recessed lower panel, and the flat top surface.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard layout with alternating white and black keys, approximately 36 keys visible, evenly spaced with no missing or non-standard keys.
